DELETE FROM tModel WHERE tModelKey IN (SELECT tModelKey FROM tModel WHERE tModelKey IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1);
DELETE FROM tModel WHERE tModelKey IN (SELECT DISTINCT tModelKey FROM tModel WHERE creationDate < '2000-01-01');
WITH deleted AS (DELETE FROM tModel WHERE tModelKey = 'testModelKey' RETURNING *) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM deleted;
DELETE FROM tModel WHERE tModelKey = ANY (SELECT tModelKey FROM tModel WHERE status = 'retired');
DELETE FROM tModel WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM tModel WHERE expired = TRUE) AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM service WHERE tModelId = id);
DELETE FROM tModel WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM service WHERE service.tModelId = tModel.tModelKey AND service.active = TRUE);
DELETE FROM tModel WHERE tModelKey IN (SELECT tModelKey FROM tModel WHERE createdBy = (SELECT userId FROM users WHERE username = 'testUser'));
DELETE FROM tModel WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bindingTemplates WHERE tModelKey = bindingTemplates.tModelKey AND bindingTemplates.status = 'inactive') AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';

WITH cte AS (SELECT tModelKey FROM tModel WHERE creationDate < '2023-01-01') DELETE FROM tModel WHERE tModelKey IN (SELECT tModelKey FROM cte WHERE tModelKey NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT tModelKey FROM usageLog));
